top_signals.title: Two Geothermal Bets Are Starting to Undercut Nuclear on Cost
top_signals.summary: While the Trump administration keeps pushing domestic energy addition through funding vehicles and executive orders aimed at grid reliability and AI-driven demand growth, two next-generation geothermal developers just posted updates that move past announcements and into measurable progress on drilling and capital formation. Fervo announced that its third-generation well design at Cape Station in Utah has lifted drilling rates by 143% compared with the first Cape well.  The latest well, Sawtooth 7, reached 19,448 feet measured depth, including…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
